mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = 0

SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.data_scope, r.status, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.role_id = r.id) AS user_count FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.data_scope, r.status, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.role_id = r.id) AS user_count FROM sys_role r WHERE r.id = #{roleId} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId}
